title: Repository Restructure + Next.js Scaffold
purpose: Move backend domains to src/backend/, scaffold Next.js frontend in src/frontend/, establish shared contracts layer, and update all tooling configurations to support both surfaces.

deliverables.description: All existing backend domains moved from src/identity/, src/shared/ (infra)
Next.js App Router root with layout.tsx and page.tsx
Frontend utilities, API layer placeholder, Supabase clients placeholder
Component root with ui/ and domain/ folders
Updated with path aliases for frontend

acceptance_criteria: npm run build:frontend succeeds without errors
npm run dev starts backend API on port 3001
Existing backend tests pass (npm run test:unit, npm run test:integration)
npm run lint passes for all surfaces
npm run typecheck passes for all surfaces
Path aliases resolve correctly in both backend and frontend

failure_modes.mitigation: Separate tsconfig paths or strict module boundaries
